message:
feat(wal): add disk persistence with CRC32 integrity and crash recovery

Extends the in-memory WAL engine with disk-backed persistence for bead
ft-283h4.2 (continuous zero-cost snapshots). New capabilities:

- CRC32/ISO-HDLC checksum computation with compile-time lookup table
- WalFrame wire format: length-prefixed JSON with CRC32 trailer
- DiskWal<T>: append-only file with crash recovery on load
- Truncation-based recovery: corrupt tail entries are detected and trimmed
- compact_and_rewrite: atomic temp-file rotation for background compaction
- MuxMutation enum: 9 FrankenTerm-specific state change variants
- 46 new tests (94 total): CRC32 vectors, frame roundtrip, crash recovery,
  disk persistence across sessions, compaction rewrite, MuxMutation serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
